onboarding.welcomeBody: End to end encrypted messages that disappear on a timer and live only on your devices.
onboarding.welcomeFootnote: Your account stays on this device. No cloud, no number.
onboarding.nameHelper: This is shareable, not private. Use anything you like.
onboarding.relayBody: The server only forwards sealed messages and never sees their content. Your keys are published only to the server you pick, so choose your own here if you plan to use one.
onboarding.relayFootnote: You can switch servers later in Settings.
onboarding.keygenBody: Generating a unique identity for this device. This happens entirely on your phone.
onboarding.keygenStep3: Sealing private key in secure storage
onboarding.keysReadyBody: Only this device holds the private key. No one else can read your messages.
onboarding.createPinBody: Used to unlock Nuco if biometrics fail. 6 digits.
onboarding.pinMismatch: PINs do not match. Try again.
onboarding.biometricsBody: Use Face ID or your fingerprint for a faster unlock. It is checked by your phone, not by Nuco.
onboarding.biometricsFallback: Your PIN still works as a fallback
onboarding.notificationsBody: Content free by default. You will see that a message arrived, never a preview, until you open Nuco.
onboarding.deviceOnlyTitle:
Your account lives only
on this device
onboarding.deviceOnlyGood: No one, not even Nuco, can read or restore your messages.
onboarding.deviceOnlyWarn: If you lose this device, your account and history are gone for good.
onboarding.completeBody: Scan a friend's code in person to start your first encrypted chat.

tutorial.connectBody: Add a contact by showing your QR code or scanning theirs, face to face. That first scan ties their name to their real encryption keys.
tutorial.verifyBody: Every chat has a safety number that both phones can show. If it matches in person, no one is sitting between you.
tutorial.disappearBody: Each chat has a timer that removes messages on both phones. Changing it is a request the other side has to accept first.
tutorial.privacyBody: The lock guards the keys that decrypt your messages, and messages live only on your devices. The server only ever sees sealed ciphertext.

lock.faceIdBody: Look at your phone to unlock
lock.attemptsLeft: {{count}} attempts left before PIN is required
lock.lockedBody: Too many incorrect attempts. Nuco is paused for a few minutes.
lock.lockedDataSafe: Your data stays encrypted while locked

chats.title: Chats
chats.emptyBody: Scan a contact's code to start a verified, end to end encrypted chat.

conversation.emptyVerifiedBody: Messages are end to end encrypted and disappear on a timer. Say hello.
conversation.blockedBody: They cannot message you, and you will not see new messages, until you unblock.
conversation.pendingBody: You can chat once you and {{name}} have scanned each other and confirmed the emojis match.

retention.title: Disappearing messages
retention.body: Sets how long messages stay before they vanish. A change is a request that only applies once {{name}} accepts.
retention.waiting: Waiting for {{name}} to accept the change to {{value}}.
retention.incomingBody: {{name}} asked to set messages to disappear after {{value}}.
retention.acceptedBody: {{name}} accepted your request. Messages in this chat now disappear after {{value}}.
retention.bothNotified: Both parties are notified of every retention change.
retention.systemRequestIn: {{name}} asked to set messages to disappear after {{value}}
retention.systemRequestInOff: {{name}} asked to turn off disappearing messages
retention.systemRequestOut: You asked to set messages to disappear after {{value}}
retention.systemRequestOutOff: You asked to turn off disappearing messages
retention.systemChangedInOff: {{name}} accepted. Disappearing messages are now off
retention.systemChangedOut: You accepted. Messages now disappear after {{value}}
retention.systemChangedOutOff: You accepted. Disappearing messages are now off

call.statusEncrypted: End to end encrypted, via relay
call.speaker: Speaker
call.micSoftAskBody: Nuco uses the microphone only during calls. Audio is end to end encrypted and never recorded.
call.micDeniedBody: Turn the microphone on for Nuco in your phone settings.
call.errorNoTurn: This server has no call relay configured, so calls cannot connect.
call.errorOffline: You are offline. Connect to your server to call.
call.errorNoSession: Calling needs mutual verification with {{name}}. Verify each other in person first.
call.errorBlocked: You blocked {{name}}. Unblock them to call.
call.errorBusy: You are already in a call.
call.errorGeneric: The call could not be started.

contacts.title: Contacts
contacts.emptyBody: Add a contact by scanning their code in person.

addContact.title: Add contact
addContact.showHint: Have them scan this to verify you in person
addContact.scanCaption: Scanning verifies their identity key in person
addContact.cameraSoftAskBody: Nuco uses the camera only to scan a contact's code. Nothing is recorded or saved.
addContact.cameraDeniedBody: Turn the camera on for Nuco in your phone settings.
addContact.invalidBody: Hold steady and keep the whole code inside the frame.
addContact.notNucoTitle: That is not a Nuco code
addContact.notNucoBody: This QR is a valid code, just not a Nuco identity.
addContact.selfBody: You cannot add yourself as a contact. Scan a friend's code instead.
addContact.successBody: You scanned their code in person. Identity keys match, so this contact is now trusted.

verification.title: Verify {{name}}
verification.compareBody: Compare this safety number with {{name}}'s, in person. If they match, you are talking to the right device.
verification.mutualHint: Let {{name}} scan your code too, then check that both phones show the same codes.
verification.waitingBody: Have {{name}} scan your code and confirm the emojis. Messaging unlocks once both of you have confirmed.
verification.verifiedBody: You and {{name}} confirmed each other. Messaging is unlocked.
verification.reVerifiedBody: {{name}}'s safety number matches. This conversation is still end to end verified.
verification.changedBody: This usually means they reinstalled Nuco or got a new phone. Less often, it can mean someone is intercepting messages.

contactDetail.title: Contact
contactDetail.waitingForPeer: Waiting for {{name}} to confirm you back.
contactDetail.deleteConfirmBody: This removes {{name}}, your conversation, and all its messages from this device. It cannot be undone.

system.verified: You verified each other. Messages are unlocked.

settings.title: Settings
settings.wipeDataDetail: Erase keys and messages on this device
settings.wipeConfirmBody: Your keys and messages are stored only here and cannot be recovered. Hold to confirm.
settings.deleteAccountDetail: Remove your handle and prekeys from the server, then erase everything on this device.
settings.deleteConfirmBody: This deletes your account from the server and wipes all keys and messages on this device. It cannot be undone.

about.title: About and privacy
about.privacyBody: The relay forwards sealed ciphertext and never sees your messages or keys. It can still see which handles are in contact, timing, and a padded message size. Your messages and keys live only on this device.

global.serverUnreachableBody: Messages will stay queued until it is back.

errors.PROTOCOL_VERSION_MISMATCH: This app version is not compatible with the server. Please update.
errors.MALFORMED_MESSAGE: Something went wrong talking to the server.
errors.AUTH_FAILED: Could not verify this device with the server.
errors.NOT_REGISTERED: This device is not registered with the server yet.
errors.NO_SUCH_HANDLE: That contact could not be found on the server.
errors.NO_ONE_TIME_PREKEY: That contact has no prekeys left. Try again later.
errors.RATE_LIMITED: Too many requests. Please slow down.
errors.QUEUE_FULL: That contact's inbox is full. Try again later.
errors.MESSAGE_TOO_LARGE: That message is too large to send.
errors.INTERNAL: The server had a problem. Please try again.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
